# SΔϕ Boundary-to-Closure Spine — AI Routing Entry

GitHub is the AI-readable access/routing layer; Zenodo is the citation/preservation layer.

Start with README.md, SDELTA_ACCESS_PROTOCOL.yaml, SDELTA_MODULE_ROUTING.yaml, indexes/SPINE_MAP.yaml, indexes/ROUTE_INDEX.json, and SERIES_DOI_MAP.json.

Core boot route: SDeltaPhi-01 -> SDeltaPhi-03 -> SDeltaPhi-47 -> SDeltaPhi-62.

v1.5 event/authority/fixation route: SDeltaPhi-19 -> SDeltaPhi-20 -> SDeltaPhi-21 -> SDeltaPhi-22 -> SDeltaPhi-23 -> SDeltaPhi-24 -> SDeltaPhi-25 -> SDeltaPhi-26 -> SDeltaPhi-27.

Use the smallest sufficient module. Do not activate full spines by keyword alone. Use SDeltaPhi-62 for factual/evidential/world-binding claims and SDeltaPhi-56 for transition-completion-cost estimation.
